stars.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
stars.highlights: A lightweight framework from OpenAI for building multi-agent workflows with modular components and orchestration capabilities. It enables developers to create complex agent interactions while maintaining simplicity and performance.
stars.worthReading: It represents OpenAI's official approach to agent frameworks, offering production-ready patterns from the creators of leading AI models.
stars.scoreReason: High relevance for frontier AI topics (agents/LLM tooling), strong concreteness as a working framework, and moderate freshness as an established but actively maintained OpenAI project.

stars.description: This is a collection of the best SVG images of pelicans riding bicycles.
stars.highlights: This repository is a curated collection of SVG images depicting pelicans riding bicycles, offering a whimsical and creative visual dataset. It serves as a unique resource for artistic inspiration or testing image processing tools with unconventional imagery.
stars.worthReading: It showcases creative AI applications in generating or curating novel visual content, potentially useful for testing multi-modal models or as a fun, offbeat dataset.
stars.scoreReason: Low freshness (established but niche), moderate relevance (multi-modal dataset), and high concreteness (specific SVG collection).

stars.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
stars.highlights: A format specification for describing visual identity to coding agents, enabling persistent, structured understanding of design systems. It provides agents with consistent design context across coding tasks.
stars.worthReading: It addresses the emerging need for AI agents to maintain design consistency in code generation, making it valuable for teams implementing AI-assisted development workflows.
stars.scoreReason: Good freshness with moderate traction, high relevance to agent tooling, and concrete specification format.

stars.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
stars.highlights: An open-source ML engineer that automates the end-to-end ML pipeline from reading research papers to training and deploying models. It aims to reduce manual effort in implementing and operationalizing machine learning research.
stars.worthReading: It represents an ambitious attempt to automate complex ML workflows, potentially saving significant engineering time for practitioners implementing cutting-edge research.
stars.scoreReason: Strong relevance to frontier AI (agent automation) and concrete implementation, with moderate freshness as a rising repository gaining traction.
